message:
fix(tui): suppress duplicated operational panels in dashboard bottom rail (br-q41fu)

When the insight rail is in Megagrid or Supergrid layout, it already
renders ToolLatency, Projects, and Reservations panels. The bottom
rail's no-preview branch was unconditionally rendering these same
panels again, causing visual duplication. Now checks insight_layout
and skips operational panels already present in the insight rail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
